authored_metadata.use_guidance: Use this neutral MyST scaffold as a starting structure. Adapt headings and prose to the selected survey contract and evidence; do not treat placeholder text as a topic claim.
Use this neutral article presentation when no venue-specific LaTeX stock has been selected. Inspect and repair the paper-local composed TeX before build readiness.

latex.source_provenance: Isomer Labs packaged neutral article template
latex.license_posture: Project-authored template distributed with Isomer Labs
